--- edge_edge_hint.sql
(a)-[e]->@{JOIN_METHOD=HASH_JOIN}-[f]->(b)

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphPattern{
  Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Rparen:  2,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 1,
                  NameEnd: 2,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  3,
              EndPos:    9,
              Direction: "RIGHT",
              Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 5,
                  NameEnd: 6,
                  Name:    "e",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Hint: &ast.Hint{
              Atmark:  9,
              Rbrace:  32,
              Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
                &ast.HintRecord{
                  Key: &ast.Path{
                    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                      &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 11,
                        NameEnd: 22,
                        Name:    "JOIN_METHOD",
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  Value: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 23,
                    NameEnd: 32,
                    Name:    "HASH_JOIN",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  33,
              EndPos:    39,
              Direction: "RIGHT",
              Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 35,
                  NameEnd: 36,
                  Name:    "f",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  39,
              Rparen:  41,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 40,
                  NameEnd: 41,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
(a)-[e]->@{JOIN_METHOD=HASH_JOIN} -[f]->(b)
